scripts.rulesync:skills: bun run rulesync install --mode rulesync && bun scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && bun run rulesync generate --targets codexcli --features skills
scripts.rulesync:skills:update: bun run rulesync install --mode rulesync --update && bun scripts/patch-rulesync-skill-frontmatter.ts && bun run rulesync generate --targets codexcli --features skills
